meta.title: Quranic Reading Practice
meta.subtitle: Short passages with transliteration and meaning — read right to left.

passages.title: Al-Fatiha — opening
passages.english: In the name of Allah, the Most Merciful, the Especially Merciful.
passages.notes: Say before reciting any portion of the Quran.

passages.title: Al-Fatiha — praise
passages.english: All praise is due to Allah, Lord of all the worlds.

passages.title: Al-Ikhlas (112:1–4)
passages.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ ۝ اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ ۝ لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ ۝ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
passages.transliteration: Qul huwa Allāhu aḥad · Allāhu ṣ-ṣamad · Lam yalid wa lam yūlad · Wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan aḥad
passages.english: Say: He is Allah, One · Allah, the Eternal Refuge · He neither begets nor is born · Nor is there to Him any equivalent.
passages.notes: Equivalent to one-third of the Quran in reward (hadith).

passages.title: Al-Falaq (113)
passages.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ ۝ مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
passages.transliteration: Qul aʿūdhu bi-rabbil-falaq · Min sharri mā khalaq
passages.english: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak · From the evil of what He created.

passages.title: An-Nas (114)
passages.arabic: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ ۝ مَلِكِ النَّاسِ
passages.english: Say: I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind · The Sovereign of mankind.

passages.title: Ayat al-Kursi — start
passages.arabic: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
passages.transliteration: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa l-ḥayyu l-qayyūm
passages.english: Allah — there is no deity except Him, the Ever-Living, the Sustainer of all.
